added.name: DOTA_Tooltip_ability_jakiro_double_trouble_Note0
added.value: The second attack ignores Damage Block.

added.name: DOTA_Tooltip_ability_seasonal_dark_carnival_firework_Description
added.value: Shoot a firework into the air.

added.name: dota_chatwheel_header_dark_carnival_cw_desc
added.value: Earned from the Dark Carnival event.

added.name: dota_chatwheel_header_dark_carnival_sprays_desc
added.value: Earned from the Dark Carnival event.

added.name: DOTA_Overworld_Inventory_PathUnlocker
added.value: Path Unlock tickets can unlock a node without spending the tokens normally required. Use them by clicking the UNLOCK NOW button under the node cost.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_TooltipOverworldHero_Heading_1
added.value: Play {s:hero_name} to earn {s:token_name_0} tickets.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_TooltipOverworldHero_Heading_2
added.value: Play {s:hero_name} to earn {s:token_name_0} and {s:token_name_1} tickets.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_TooltipOverworldHero_Heading_3
added.value: Play {s:hero_name} to earn {s:token_name_0}, {s:token_name_1}, and {s:token_name_2} tickets.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Splash_EventDescription
added.value: Guide Hoodwink and Legion Commander through Ringmaster's circus train by playing Dota and unlocking new rewards along the way.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Splash_EventDescriptionShort
added.value: Explore Ringmaster's circus train by playing Dota and unlocking new rewards along the way.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Splash_BackStory
added.value: Catch up on the back story!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Checkout_ConfirmPurchaseWithCoins
added.value: This purchase will cost {d:coin_cost} Dark Carnival Discount Coins to complete. Are you sure you want to continue?

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Checkout_InsufficientCoins
added.value: You do not have enough Dark Carnival Discount Coins to complete the purchase.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_SalesDescription_Axe
added.value: Automaton Axe was almost smelted down because he is an engine of murderous rage with a single goal: The death of all things. If you see this as more of a feature than a bug, this is the automaton for you.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_SalesDescription_Bristleback
added.value: Automaton Bristlecack runs only on the purest of cask-strength, first-press machine oils, but he wouldn't say no to the occasional bottom-shelf crankcase runoff, if you were going to pour it out anyway. It's perfectly good, innit, give it 'ere.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_SalesDescription_Oracle
added.value: Automation Oracle is cursed, like a tragic Greek heroine, to see the future while remaining powerless to change it. Unlike a tragic Greek heroine, nobody ignores him because they disbelieve his prophecies. They ignore him because he’s extremely irritating.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_SalesDescription_LegionCommander
added.value: Automaton Legion Commander is, like her human counterpart, driven to crush her enemies under her robotic bootheel. Unlike her human counterpart, she is less inclined to stop.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_SalesDescription_Morphling
added.value: Automaton Morphling is, unlike his water-based counterpart, more suggestive of liquid as a metaphor, and more literally made of actual steel. Technology has really come a long way.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_Description_Point2_Axe
added.value: Test your strength on your enemies, with new Culling Blade effects!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_Description_Point3_Axe
added.value: Surprise your foes with new Counter Helix animations!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_Description_Point4_Axe
added.value: All Axe voice lines updated with new robotic processing! (Grammar not improved.)

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_Description_Point5_Axe
added.value: Axe animatronics fully support all Axe taunts!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_Description_Point1_LegionCommander
added.value: New and improved appearance strikes fear into foes!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_Description_Point2_LegionCommander
added.value: Shocking new visual effects for Overwhleming Odds and Duel!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_Description_Point3_LegionCommander
added.value: Smooth and graceful custom movement animations!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_Description_Point4_LegionCommander
added.value: All Legion Commander voice lines have been digitally enhanced!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_Description_Point5_LegionCommander
added.value: Special animatronics fully support all Legion Commander taunts!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_Description_Point2_Bristleback
added.value: Completely safe ambient effects, including back-mounted flame exhaust!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_Description_Point3_Bristleback
added.value: Non-biological replacement effects for Nasal Goo, Quill Spray, and Hair Ball!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_Description_Point4_Bristleback
added.value: All Bristleback voice lines updated with robotic filtering!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_Description_Point5_Bristleback
added.value: Internal gear system fully supports all Bristleback taunts!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_Description_Point1_Oracle
added.value: Luminous new hero model, with ambient effects!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_Description_Point2_Oracle
added.value: Futurist replacement effects for Fortune's End and Fate's Edict!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_Description_Point3_Oracle
added.value: Custom replacement animations, including movement and teleportation!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_Description_Point4_Oracle
added.value: All Oracle voice lines updated with advanced processing. (Prediction accuracy not improved.)

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_Description_Point1_Morphling
added.value: New hero model with smooth shapes and details!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_Description_Point3_Morphling
added.value: Custom replacement animations, including movement, disassembly, and more!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonPersona_Description_Point4_Morphling
added.value: All Morphling voice lines updated with new mechanical processing!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_AutomatonBundle_Description
added.value: Save when purchasing all 5 automaton personas

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_SecretRoomsPack_Description_Point2
added.value: Dark Carnival Music Pack (new tracks for all music and stingers)!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_SecretRoomsPack_Description_Point3
added.value: x2 Secret Room Tickets (granting access to secret rooms in The Smelting Car and The Storage Car, and their stories and rewards)!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Store_MidnightRunBundle_DiscountCoinDescription
added.value: Can be purchased for FREE by collecting 10 Dark Carnival Discount Coins

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_GiftFromFriend
added.value: A friend of yours has sent you a gift!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_FreeTicket
added.value: Here's a free ticket to start your quest.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_FrontPage_SmallEventDescription
added.value: Earn rewards and follow Ringmasters' attempt to capture souls for his Dark Carnival.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_FrontPage_FirstTime_Claim
added.value: Claim your free treasure to get started!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_StoreCell_Description
added.value: Introducing Automaton Personas, a new treasure, the Secret Rooms pack, and more!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Encounter_PickLock_Description
added.value: Help Slark break out of his cell!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Encounter_FriendGifting_Description
added.value: Gift tickets you don't need with your friends!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Encounter_TicketSmelter_Description
added.value: Smelt things you probably shouldn't smelt!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Encounter_TicketSmelter_Bristleback_Note
added.value: WENT TO RECAPTURE A CLOWN. BACK IN FIVE MINS. IF YOU ARE HERE TO BE SMELTED PLEASE SMELT SELF. DO NOT SMELT ANYTHING ELSE. UNAUTHORIZED SMELTING IS A SMELTABLE OFFENSE.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Encounter_TicketSmelter_Tooltip
added.value: Smelt down extra tickets into bonus rewards!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Encounter_TicketSmelter_NothingLeft
added.value: You've smelted everything the ticket smelter can currently create.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Encounter_TicketSmelter_SeeingStone:f
added.value: {num_seeing_stones, plural, one{{d:num_seeing_stones} Seeing Stone} other{{d:num_seeing_stones} Seeing Stones}}

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnivalStore_CoinsInfo
added.value:
Earn Dark Carnival Discount Coins by exploring the Dark Carnival map.

Until the event ends, you can trade 10 Discount Coins for approximately a {s:regional_coin_currency} discount on anything in the Dark Carnival store costing {s:regional_coin_currency} or more. (Exact discount varies by region and currency.)

You can earn {d:total_free_coins} Discount Coins for free and an additional {d:total_explorer_coins} through the Secret Rooms Pack.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_HowToPlay_Coins_2
added.value: When you've collected 10 Discount Coins, you can trade them in for approximately a {s:regional_coin_currency} discount on anything in the Dark Carnival Store costing {s:regional_coin_currency} or more. (Any item or bundle that costs {s:regional_coin_currency} will become free.)

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnivalRewardType_Candy_Description
added.value: Back by popular demand, the Candyworks has returned to help transform your spare cavity-causing confectionaries into a pile of new hero sets, wards, couriers, and more.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnivalRewardType_Treasures_Description
added.value: Our heroes take to the center ring in Dark Carnival-themed outfits, dressed in fashionably sinister circus finery. Unpack an all-new treasure brimming with 15 carnival-themed item sets.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnivalRewardType_Goodies_Description
added.value: Express yourself with showcase decorations, loading screens, sprays and emoticons.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnivalRewardType_Oracle_Description
added.value:
The Oracle is ever willing to reward you with his powers of prognostication in exchange for these precious Seeing Stones.

Earn one stone per day merely by playing Dota and collect even more by progressing through the train.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnivalRewardType_CompletionSet_Description
added.value: Explore the Dark Carnival story to discover four themed sets hidden throughout Ringmaster's train.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnivalReward_ShowcaseDecoration_Locked
added.value: Unlock these Showcase Decorations by exploring the map.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_SecretAdmirer_GiftTitle
added.value: Select A Friend And A Ticket

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_SecretAdmirer_Gift_Tooltip
added.value: You may gift up to 5 tickets a day to your friends.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_SecretAdmirer_GiftNoneNeeded
added.value: Your friend doesn't need any Tickets!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_SecretAdmirer_NoMoreAvailable
added.value: You have no more gifts available today

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_SecretAdmirer_GiftAvailableTooltip
added.value: A friend of yours has sent you a gift!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_SecretRoomsPack_RequiredForRewardsClaims
added.value:
Requires secret room pack.
Click to purchase

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_OverworldInventory_MultiselectInfo
added.value:
Play Dota to earn tickets based on your hero.

Click a ticket in the inventory or on the map to see which heroes earn those tickets.

Hold SHIFT to select multiple tickets at once.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Intro_Explore_1
added.value: Unlock nodes on the map to drive the story of Dark Carnival forward and unlock content, including story snippets, cosmetic items, redeemable currencies, and minigames.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Intro_Explore_2
added.value: The Main Quest of the map, including story and rewards, is available to everyone for free.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Intro_Explore_3
added.value: Unlocking each node requires a unique set of tickets. You earn tickets by playing games of Dota.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Intro_PlayDota_1
added.value: Every hero has a set of three tickets.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Intro_PlayDota_2
added.value: If you win a match with that hero, you'll earn one of each ticket. If you lose, you'll get one of the three tickets randomly. Turbo matches grant two tickets for a win and none for a loss.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Intro_PlayDota_2_Tooltip
added.value:
Ability Draft games grant tickets based on the hero body, not the selected abilities.

Co-op bot games grant one ticket on a win.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Intro_PlayDota_3
added.value: Earned tickets will stay in your inventory until you use them to unlock nodes on the map. You can also use the Ticket Trader to exchange tickets you have for ones you need.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Intro_Oracle_1
added.value: The first Dota game you play per day will earn you a Seeing Stone.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Intro_Oracle_2
added.value: Bring Seeing Stones to The Oracle for additional rewards, including tickets, candy, showcase decorations, in-game consumables, and cosmetics.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Intro_Coins_1
added.value: You can earn Dark Carnival Discount Coins by unlocking paths on the map.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Intro_Coins_2
added.value: Dark Carnival Discount Coins can only be redeemed during the Dark Carnival event. The exact discount varies by region and currency.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Intro_Candyworks_1
added.value: You can earn Candy Sacks by exploring different paths on the map.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Intro_Candyworks_2
added.value: Once you've progress on the map to the Carnival Candyworks, you can trade in your candy for a variety of items, treasures, and if you're lucky, even Arcanas!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Intro_Candyworks_3
added.value: If you don't want any of the items currently on offer in the Candyworks, you can use a re-roll and generate new options. You can earn more re-rolls every time you win a match.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Intro_Treasures_1
added.value: Some locations on the map will reward Dark Carnival Treasures of Wonder. These treasures contain brand-new cosmetic sets and can be opened immediately. You can purchase additional treasures through the Dark Carnival Store.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Intro_Treasures_2
added.value: Other locations will grant other rewards, including Dark Carnival themed emoticons, sprays, showcase decorations, and loading screens.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Intro_Treasures_3
added.value: Some special locations grant unique cosmetic items.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_TarotCardCollectionDescription
added.value:
Each Tarot grants a unique reward.
Draw the same Tarot 3 times to unlock it as a showcase decoration.

added.name: DOTA_Dark_Carnival_FortuneTellerDisabled
added.value: The Oracle has yet to be awoken.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Fortune_ExtraToken_StrengthHero
added.value: Earn an extra ticket if you win with a strength hero.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Fortune_ExtraToken_IntelligenceHero
added.value: Earn an extra ticket if you win with an intelligence hero.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Fortune_ExtraToken_AgilityHero
added.value: Earn an extra ticket if you win with a agility hero.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Fortune_ExtraToken_UniversalHero
added.value: Earn an extra ticket if you win with a universal hero.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_FortuneTeller_BalloonChargesDescription
added.value:
Gain a level for your Seasonal Carnival Balloons ability which lets you create balloons during a game.
Higher levels unlock additional charges, types of ballons and more!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_FortuneTeller_PieChargesDescription
added.value:
Gain a level for your Seasonal Carnival Pie ability which lets you throw pies at your friends and foes during a game.
Higher levels unlock additional charges, bouncing pies and more!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_FortuneTeller_FireworksChargesDescription
added.value: Gain a level for your Seasonal Carnival Fireworks ability which lets you launch fireworks during a game. Higher levels unlock additional charges, brighter fireworks and more!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_FortuneTeller_PathUnlockDescription
added.value: Instantly unlock any node without spending the tickets normally required.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_FortuneTeller_TokensReceived
added.value: You have received these tickets from the Oracle.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_FortuneTeller_WelcomeDescription
added.value: Earn a Seeing Stone once a day by playing games of Dota. Spend them here receive your fortune and get rewards!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_FortuneTeller_DescriptionSubtitle
added.value: Earn Seeing Stones by playing games of Dota

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_FortuneTeller_StoryInformation
added.value: Continue revealing fortunes to progress through The Oracle's story and unlock additional rewards.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_ItemRecieved_SeeingStone:f
added.value: {GrantPoints, plural, one{{d:GrantPoints} Seeing Stone} other{{d:GrantPoints} Seeing Stones}}

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_NodeBreaker_Tooltip
added.value: Use a Path Unlock ticket instead of your other tickets.

added.name: DOTA_Dark_Carnival_CandyworksDisabled
added.value: The Carnival Candyworks is currently closed. It will open when you unlock it on the map.

added.name: DOTA_Dark_Carnival_CandyworksExpired
added.value: The Carnival Candyworks is closed. The event is no longer active.

added.name: DOTA_CandyShop_Dark_Carnival_Subheader
added.value: Loot for lollipops! Booty for bon bons!

added.name: DOTA_CandyShop_Dark_Carnival_Description
added.value: Sithil and Quirt have made some very unwise trades in the candy futures market, and now desperately need to acquire candy at almost any price. They are selling off their remaining treasure stash to get it - you supply the candy; they'll supply the loot.

added.name: DOTA_CandyShop_Dark_Carnival_Rules_01
added.value: Collect Candy Sacks by exploring the Dark Carnival map, or purchase them from the Dark Carnival Store.

added.name: DOTA_CandyShop_Dark_Carnival_Rules_02
added.value: Trade candy combos for rewards including Dark Carnival Discount Coins, Immortals, and Arcana.

added.name: DOTA_CandyShop_Dark_Carnival_Rules_03
added.value: If you lack the required ingredients, use pieces from your stash to exchange for those you're missing.

added.name: DOTA_CandyShop_Dark_Carnival_Rules_04
added.value: Don't like what Sithil and Quirt have to offer? Play Dota to win re-rolls and refresh the shelf - 10 maximum earned re-rolls per week.

added.name: DOTA_CandyShop_Dark_Carnival_Rules_05
added.value: Visit more Carnival Candyworks to upgrade your shop with extra rewards and trades.

added.name: DOTA_CandyShop_Dark_Carnival_Visit_Description
added.value: Visit all our locations for powerful perks!

added.name: DOTA_CandyShop_Dark_Carnival_Visit_Upgrade_1
added.value: +3 Free Candy at each new Carnival Candyworks

added.name: DOTA_CandyShop_Dark_Carnival_Reroll_Tooltip
added.value: Candyworks rerolls allow you to get a different random selection of loot. Play Dota to get more rerolls.

added.name: DOTA_Dark_Carnival_Encounter_TokenTrader_TradeRandomDescription
added.value: You will not receive the same tickets that you traded.

added.name: DOTA_Dark_Carnival_EncounterDesc_CandyShop
added.value: A place to spend all that delicious candy.

added.name: DOTA_CandyShop_Dark_Carnival_PostGame_RerollCap
added.value: You cannot earn more rerolls at this time.

added.name: DOTA_CandyShop_Dark_Carnival_PostGame_RerollCapUnlocked
added.value: Spend your rerolls at the Carnival Candyworks

added.name: DOTA_CandyShop_Dark_Carnival_PostGame_ShopLocked
added.value: Explore the Dark Carnival Train to find the Carnival Candyworks.

added.name: DOTA_Dark_Carnival_PostGame_WinEarned
added.value: Your win with {g:dota_hero_name:hero_id} earned the following rewards:

added.name: DOTA_Dark_Carnival_PostGame_LossEarned
added.value: Your game with {g:dota_hero_name:hero_id} earned the following ticket at random:

added.name: DOTA_Dark_Carnival_PostGame_TurboLossEarned
added.value: Your game with {g:dota_hero_name:hero_id} did not earn any tickets.

added.name: DOTA_Dark_Carnival_PostGame_TurboDisclaimer
added.value: Turbo matches grant two tickets for a win and none for a loss.

added.name: DOTA_Dark_Carnival_PostGame_FortuneTellerProgressEarned
added.value: You’ve already earned your daily seeing stone.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Lockpicking_GameDesc
added.value: Help Slark break out of his cell!

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Lockpicking_Help_HowToPlay
added.value: Successfully pick the lock as many times as you can before time runs out.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Lockpicking_Help_Pick_Details
added.value:
Activate the lock pick when it reaches the highlighted bar.

Missing the bar briefly disables the pick.

Blue bars grant additional time.

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_Overworld_UsePathUnlockTokenPopup_Question
added.value: Immediately unlock this path by using a Path Unlock ticket?

added.name: DOTA_DarkCarnival_TooltipEligibleForEventProgress
added.value: This setting is eligible for event progress.

added.name: dota_chatwheel_translation_darkcarnival_money_and_bones
added.value: MONEY AND BONES! MONEY AND BONES!

added.value: Automaton Bristleback Cheers - Story Showcase Decoration

added.value: Automaton Bristleback Upwards - Story Showcase Decoration

added.value: This item can be used to decorate your Profile Showcase or Mini Showcase.

added.name: DOTA_Item_Desc_Dark_Carnival_Balloon_Ability
added.value:
Access to the Dark Carnival Balloon Ability. Gain additional levels through fortunes from The Oracle.
Level 1: Base Ability
Level 2: +5 Charges
Level 3: More types of Balloons
Level 4: -20s Cooldown
Level 5: +1 Balloon spawned when cast
Level 6+: +5 Charges

added.name: DOTA_Item_Desc_Dark_Carnival_Candy_Sack
added.value: An assortment of candies to use in the Dark Carnival Candyworks.

added.name: DOTA_Item_Desc_Dark_Carnival_Fireworks_Ability
added.value:
Access to the Dark Carnival Fireworks Ability. Gain additional levels through fortunes from The Oracle.
Level 1: Base Ability
Level 2: +5 Charges
Level 3: Multiple Explosions
Level 4: -20s Cooldown
Level 5: Golden Explosion
Level 6+: +5 Charges

added.name: DOTA_Item_Desc_Dark_Carnival_Music_Pack
added.value: Transform the soundscape of your battles with the Dark Carnival music pack from composer Nathan Grigg.

added.name: DOTA_Item_Desc_Dark_Carnival_Pie_Ability
added.value:
Access to the Dark Carnival Pie Ability. Gain additional levels through fortunes from The Oracle.
Level 1: Base Ability
Level 2: +5 Charges
Level 3: +1 Bounce
Level 4: -20s Cooldown
Level 5: Golden Pie
Level 6+: +5 Charge

added.name: DOTA_Item_Desc_Dark_Carnival_Store_Coin
added.value: Collect Dark Carnival Coins by progressing through the Dark Carnival map. When you have 10 coins, you can activate them in the Dark Carnival Store to receive a discount on your next purchase.

added.name: DOTA_Item_The_High_Priestess__Tarot_Showcase_Decoration
added.value: The High Priestess - Tarot Showcase Decoration

added.name: DOTA_Item_Wheel_of_Fortune__Tarot_Showcase_Decoration
added.value: Wheel of Fortune - Tarot Showcase Decoration

removed.name: DOTA_Hotkeys_Tooltip_NeutralItemSelect5
removed.value: Select the fifth option in the Neutral Item Crafting Menu

value.old: No heroes give the selected token combination.
value.new: No heroes give the selected ticket combination.

value.old: Too many tokens selected. Each hero gives exactly three tokens.
value.new: Too many tickets selected. Each hero gives exactly three tickets.

value.old: Pathfinder tokens are part of the {s:expansion_pack_name}, available in the Crownfall Store. These tokens are used to unlock special side quests with unique rewards.
value.new: Secret Room tickets are part of the {s:expansion_pack_name}, available in the Dark Carnival Store. These tickets are used to unlock special rooms with unique rewards.

value.old: This special token was earned from an encounter.
value.new: This special ticket was earned from an encounter.

value.old: Highlight and show tokens for heroes that unlock the active paths on your Crownfall map.
value.new: Highlight and show tickets for heroes that unlock the active paths on your Dark Carnival map.
